org.moeaframework.util.PropertyScope

Package
Description
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.util
Collection of general-purpose utilities.

  • Uses of PropertyScope in org.moeaframework.core

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PropertyScope
    Settings.createScope()
    Creates a new scope wherein settings can be temporarily modified.

    Creates a new scope that allows making temporary changes to the properties.
